overview: UR COMICS is a production-grade Webtoon and Manhwa reading platform. Creators upload vertical comics with a two-phase publish pipeline, readers browse by genre, and a fast search finds comics by title, creator, or genre tag.
features: Genre system with 14 tags and many-to-many comic relationships
Homepage genre sections with horizontal scroll per genre
Search by comic title, creator name, and genre tags
Centered Sign-In hero CTA with animated hover
Chapter reader with routing fixes and error fallbacks
Chapter preview thumbnail grid in upload wizard
Two-phase DRAFT to PUBLISHED upload pipeline with rollback
Creator Studio with cover cropper and seamless stitch layout
Continue Reading smart bookmark with scroll position save
Trending comics ranked by hot score
